ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ml_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ML system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the ML system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ML system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ML system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the system was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ML system (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open source, commercial) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the system's repository */,
  "support_url" TEXT /* URL for support or community forums */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the system is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capability entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "exact_greedy" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports exact greedy algorithms */,
  "approximate_global" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports approximate global algorithms */,
  "approximate_local" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports approximate local algorithms */,
  "out_of_core" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports out-of-core processing */,
  "sparsity_aware" TEXT /* Whether the system is sparsity aware (yes, no, partially) */,
  "parallel" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports parallel processing */,
  "gpu_support" INTEGER /* Whether the system supports GPU processing */,
  "cloud_compatibility" INTEGER /* Whether the system is compatible with cloud services */,
  "api_available" INTEGER /* Whether the system has an API */,
  "gui_available" INTEGER /* Whether the system has a graphical user interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capabilities_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., user guide, release notes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the documentation file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the documentation was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation file */,
  "doc_version" TEXT /* Version of the documentation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last person who updated the documentation */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the documentation is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ML system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ML system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, percentage) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., internal test, user feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ML system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_versions_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_versions_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage statistic */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the usage statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage statistic */,
  "stat_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the statistic (e.g., users, downloads) */,
  "stat_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic data (e.g., internal logs, user reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_details" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ML system */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool or platform integrated with the ML system */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., data lake, visualization tool) */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was performed */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, pending, failed) */,
  "integration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the integration process */,
  "integrated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_details_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES ml_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_details_integrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("integrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
